text:
engage with local police services to ascertain what efforts have been made to locate the child;

host consular appointments involving the child;

advise on travel arrangements for the return of the child to england & wales.)]

Undertakings to the court by the applicant (delete as appropriate)

The applicant undertakes:

Not to remove the child[ren] from the care of the respondent until further order of this court.

Undertakings to the court by the solicitors for the applicant

The solicitors for the applicant undertake:

To issue these proceedings forthwith and in any event by no later than [date];

To pay the ex parte application fee forthwith and in any event by no later than [date];

To serve these proceedings on the respondent at the earliest available opportunity, but subject to execution of the Tipstaff [Collection] / [Location] / [Passport] Order.

Mediation

At the hearing listed below the applicant and the respondent shall each be given an opportunity (that day or on another day to be fixed) to make contact (whether in person, by telephone or otherwise) separately with the court based mediator to discuss the possibility of the parties engaging in mediation under the Child Abduction Mediation Scheme or through another non- court dispute resolution procedure and, where appropriate, to undertake a screening interview.

IT IS ORDERED THAT:

The child[ren] [is] / [are] and shall remain [a] Ward[s] of this court during their minority or until further order.

The respondent shall return child[ren] forthwith to England and Wales.

Every person within the jurisdiction of this Honourable Court who is in a position to do so shall co-operate in assisting and securing the immediate return to England and Wales of the child[ren], Ward[s] of this court.
